artifacts.summary: Truth lemma with cross-Flag temporal satisfaction (2 sorries removed)
Implementation summary documenting cross-Flag temporal satisfaction approach

completion_data.completion_summary: Resolved 2 sorries in FlagBFMCSTruthLemma.lean by implementing cross-Flag temporal satisfaction. Modified satisfies_at definition to quantify G/H across all Flags, added temporal completeness property, and updated all temporal proofs.
key_changes: Modified satisfies_at definition for .all_future and .all_past to use cross-Flag quantification
Main theorem satisfies_at_iff_mem now requires h_complete hypothesis
